g_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323004924378AA4189C96B62C0CA7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":24735,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":11278},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7379314145118896958","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错的一本小说，《我的青春恋爱物语果然有问题》里面的主要人物性格描写的很还原，尤其脱离原著和男主互动的时候，说话的方式和相处的方式都和原著人物很像。虽然是多世界融合，前100章的主要剧情还是在《我的青春恋爱物语果然有问题》，和其他动漫的衔接也并不是很突兀。男主和系统的日常交流也很有趣，希望能一直保持下去。剧情也是，把以《我的青春恋爱物语果然有问题》为主体的剧情写到原动漫结局之前，希望不要有太大的变动。后续和其他动漫剧情联动的时候，也能像现在的一样，衔接的时候不会让人感觉很突兀最好。很好看的一本小说，就是更新的太少，希望不会太监。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1718139048,"group_id":"7323092103796362302","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"何为美人？纤手，漾眸，柔腰肢。可否具体？橘子香气。可否再具体","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5gyPx7d9XgYiiMvSkx9ZMQ=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3249fb85dacc4f3595ee69344d0287fd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793949&x-signature=OzEFpiEVbJrrQyr%2Bcy0uHah1h8g%3D","user_id":"102015535060","user_name":"既离"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"102015535060","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1724618360,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},
